Notice Of Motion And Motion To Seal Certificates Of Merit, Permit Service On Doe Defendants, Permit Plaintiff To File An Amended Complaint, And Permit Plaintiff To Proceed Under A Fictitious Name
Off Calendar Apr-21-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF L. G.'s Motion To Seal Certificates Of Merit, Permit Service On Doe Defendants, Permit Plaintiff To File An Amended Complaint, And Permit Plaintiff To Proceed Under A Fictitious Name.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's motion to seal certificates of merit and corroborative fact, permit service on Doe defendants, permit plaintiff to file an amended complaint and permit plaintiff to proceed under a fictitious name is GRANTED.

Order signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
